title: Episode 1
overview: Now at an NGO in Penamstan, Claire discovers signs reminiscent of Raccoon City. Leon makes his way to the White House, unaware that it's under attack.

title: Episode 2
overview: Leon, along with agents Jason and Shen May, embarks on a covert mission to infiltrate a research facility in Shanghai aboard a nuclear submarine.

title: Episode 3
overview: Claire discovers a grim scene at the home of one of the last surviving members of the Mad Dogs Unit. Shen May warns Leon about an ominous conspiracy.

title: Episode 4
overview: Secretary Wilson threatens Claire's life, demanding that she drop her investigation. Leon and Shen May rush to the vast subterranean bioweapons lab.
